hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [[ -z "$FILE" ]] || [[ ! "$FILE" =~ \.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$ ]]; then exit 0; fi; if [[ "$FILE" == */frontend/* ]]; then cd /Volumes/Data/RND/Universal-POS/frontend && npx eslint "$FILE" 2>&1; LINT=$?; npm run tsc 2>&1; TSC=$?; [[ $LINT -ne 0 || $TSC -ne 0 ]] && exit 2; elif [[ "$FILE" == */backend/* ]]; then cd /Volumes/Data/RND/Universal-POS/backend && npx eslint "$FILE" 2>&1; LINT=$?; npm run typecheck 2>&1; TC=$?; [[ $LINT -ne 0 || $TC -ne 0 ]] && exit 2; fi; exit 0
